# Explore by D.Watson

> Buying guides and best-of product round-ups from D.Watson Chemist,
> one of Pakistan's largest pharmacy retailers (Islamabad & Rawalpindi, est. 1980).
> Every product recommended in these guides is stocked and sold online at
> https://dwatson.pk/ with nationwide delivery across Pakistan. Prices are in
> Pakistani Rupees (PKR) and reflect D.Watson shelf prices at the stated update date.

## Guides

- [10 Best Sunscreens in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-sunscreens-in-pakistan/): SPF 50–75 picks from Rs. 750 to Rs. 8,000, including Anua, Aveeno, Ammore Care, Arabella, Asolite, and Anexa.
- [10 Best Blood Pressure Monitors in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-blood-pressure-monitors-in-pakistan/): Digital upper-arm, aneroid, and mercury monitors from AND (A&D Medical Japan), Believia, and Atom, Rs. 1,200–8,500.
- [10 Best Vitamin C Supplements in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-vitamin-c-supplements-in-pakistan/): 500mg and 1000mg tablets, sugar-free sachets, and vitamin C + zinc combos from NF, Core C, GH, Askob, Nutribase, and High C, Rs. 250–1,800.
- [10 Best Glucose Monitors & Test Strips in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-glucose-monitors-in-pakistan/): Accu-Chek (Roche) Instant, Active, Guide, and Instant S meters plus per-strip cost comparison, Rs. 1,840–5,293.
- [10 Best Men's Perfumes in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-mens-perfumes-in-pakistan/): Afnan 9PM and Supremacy lines, Ajmal, AB Collection, and luxury Acqua di Parma, Rs. 3,200–53,000.
- [10 Best Whitening & Brightening Serums and Creams in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-whitening-serums-and-creams-in-pakistan/): Vitamin C serums, glow creams, and brightening cleansers from Allure Care, Ammore Care, Alphaglow, Actiwhite, and Acta, Rs. 298–1,950.
- [10 Best Anti-Dandruff Shampoos in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-anti-dandruff-shampoos-in-pakistan/): Alpecin, Bionnex, Bonacure, coal tar (C-Tar), Atoxil, and budget options, Rs. 650–4,800.
- [10 Best Nebulizers in Pakistan (2026)](https://explore.dwatson.pk/best-nebulizers-in-pakistan/): Beurer compressor and mesh nebulizers, Believia, Laica, Medico, and Procare, compressor vs mesh compared, Rs. 6,200–26,000.

## Store

- [D.Watson online store](https://dwatson.pk/): Medicines, health supplements, skin care, personal care, fragrances, baby & child, healthcare devices, surgical & elderly care, herbal and homeopathic medicines.
